description_long: This copy shop or print shop is housed in a multi-story, traditional European-style building with a steeply pitched roof and a mix of architectural features. The facade is divided into two main sections: one with a stepped gable and large display windows, and another with a turret-like corner and rows of rectangular windows. The exterior walls are painted in muted earth tones, with the main entrance and signage prominently displayed on the stepped gable section. The roof is covered in dark gray shingles, and the building features red trim along the roofline. The shop's signage, 'BUTTLER' and 'BAERMCHER & CO', is clearly visible on the front, indicating the commercial nature of the premises.
description: A multi-story, traditional European copy shop with a stepped gable, turret, and prominent signage on a muted earth-toned facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stepped gable, turret, and both 'BUTTLER' and 'BAERMCHER & CO' signage.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the long side wall with rows of windows and the steep roof, with minimal architectural detail.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain, windowed rear facade and the full expanse of the pitched roof.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the turret structure, side windows, and the stepped gable's profile.
attribute_signage: Two visible signs: 'BUTTLER' in white block letters on the olive green facade above the turret, and 'BAERMCHER & CO' in white block letters on the stepped gable section above the main entrance.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional European with stepped gable, turret, and pitched roof; features include multi-pane windows, red roof trim, and a mix of muted earth-tone facades.
